Published on March 4, 2026

⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.

Quick Summary

After testing 15+ indoor cat food brands, here are our top picks for 2026:

🏆 Top Pick: Hill's Science Diet Indoor

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.7/5

Best for: Indoor cats, weight management

Price: $44.99 for 15.5lbs

Why Indoor Cats Need Special Food

Indoor cats need:

  • Lower calories (less active)
  • Higher fiber (hairball control)
  • Weight management support

Top Picks

1. Hill’s Science Diet Indoor - Best Overall

Pros: Vet recommended, hairball control, weight management

Cons: Contains grains

2. Royal Canin Indoor - Best for Hairballs

Pros: Hairball formula, highly palatable

Cons: Premium price

Check Price on Amazon →

3. Blue Buffalo Indoor - Best Natural

Pros: Real meat, no by-products

Cons: Higher price

Check Price on Amazon →

FAQ

What makes food “indoor” formula?

Lower calories, higher fiber for less active cats.

How much should indoor cats eat?

Typically 20% less than outdoor cats of same weight.
